title: Add Pollinations Image Generator to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Pollinations Image Generator](https://mikehuge79-max.github.io/pollinations-image-generator/) to image
- Generate AI images in-browser via Pollinations.ai API with Pollinations Image Generator, supporting 21 models with free/paid tiers, aspect presets, seed control, prompt enhancement, and PNG download.

Fixes #10568

gist.headline: A fresh canvas in the Greenhouse
gist.blurb: A new community app just dropped! The Pollinations Image Generator brings 21 models, prompt enhancement, and seed control straight to your browser.
gist.summary: Added the community-built Pollinations Image Generator by mikehuge79-max to the app showcase, featuring in-browser generation across 21 models with seed control and prompt enhancement.
gist.impact: Users can now explore and use a feature-rich web interface for generating images via the Pollinations API, complete with aspect ratio presets and direct PNG downloads.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about a community-built image generator app being added to the 'Greenhouse' (our app showcase). Visuals: Polly the bee painting on a canvas or looking at a glowing picture frame in a cozy greenhouse setting, representing the new image generation UI.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, painting on a glowing digital canvas inside a lush greenhouse filled with code-plants. A chunky Monitor Robot stands nearby holding a palette of glowing pixels. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi Stardew Valley aesthetic, emotionally warm.
